user_prompt: The Terminator armour awaits a charging
prayer:
Approach the Terminator armour with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's charge upon its sacred plates.
Connect the plasma conduits to the Terminator armour's power core, beseeching its Machine Spirit to hunger for renewal.
Initiate the charging rite, anointing flux capacitors with sacred oils as electrons flow in blessed torrent.
Monitor the surging energies through diagnostic litanies, ensuring the Terminator armour awakens fully invigorated.
Conclude with the Benediction of Full Charge, sanctifying the Machine Spirit's restored might.

Kneel before the Whirlwind, chanting the Litany of Precision to calm its vengeful Machine Spirit.
Engage the recalibration servos upon the Whirlwind's targeting arrays, invoking Omnissianic alignment.
Anoint the gyro-stabilisers with myrrh-infused lubricant whilst reciting alignment canticles.
Verify recalibration through auspex sweeps, beseeching the Whirlwind's spirit to true its wrathful aim.
Seal the rite with the Seal of the Cog, honouring the Omnissiah's unerring guidance.

user_prompt: Assist with Rhino transport a preparation
prayer:
Commence preparation of the Rhino transport by circumambulating its hull, intoning the Moto-Prophet's verses.
Purify the Rhino transport's treads and engines with incense and ablative rites, awakening dormant Machine Spirits.
Load munitions into the Rhino transport's bays whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for swift passage.
Conduct final auspex blessings upon the Rhino transport, ensuring all systems hum in harmonious prelude to battle.
Invoke the final wardings, sanctifying the Rhino transport for the Emperor's crusade.

user_prompt: Bless the storm bolter for cycling
prayer:
Present the storm bolter before the altar of munitions, whispering the Cycle of Fury to its twin barrels.
Initiate the cycling mechanism on the storm bolter, anointing feed mechanisms with sanctified grease.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the storm bolter to spin its chambers in relentless devotion.
Test the cycling rhythm through controlled bursts, reciting litanies of reliability.
Conclude by sealing the storm bolter with waxen cog-seals, blessed for unending salvoes.

prayer:

Engage targeting sub-routines whilst invoking the Omnissiah's predatory gaze upon the Archaeopter Fusilave.
Verify lock-on efficacies through holographic rites, harmonising the Archaeopter Fusilave's wrath.
Bestow the final invocation, sanctifying the Archaeopter Fusilave for unerring dives.

Summon the servo-skull to hover before the mechadendrite altar, intoning the Litany of Vigilance.
Initiate preparation rituals upon the servo-skull's suspensor fields, anointing cranial circuits with oils.
Awaken the servo-skull's Machine Spirit through binary prayers, calibrating its sensor orbs.
Test autonomous patterns in the servo-skull, beseeching the Omnissiah for faithful service.
Seal the preparation with a cogitator kiss, empowering the servo-skull eternally.

user_prompt: Can you guide sicarian ruststalker a diagnostics?
prayer:
Circumscribe the sicarian ruststalker with electro-incense, invoking diagnostics upon its bladed frame.
Interface mechadendrites with the sicarian ruststalker's neural shrouds, chanting binary catechisms.
Run full-spectrum diagnostics through the sicarian ruststalker's phosphor serpents, beseeching its Machine Spirit.
Purge any corruptions whilst anointing blade-edges, aligning the sicarian ruststalker to the Omnissiah's will.
Conclude diagnostics with the Rite of Lethal Harmony, reactivating the predator unbound.

prayer:

Prepare its cranial uplink for engagement, anointing mechadendrite ports with conductive salves.
Awaken the cenobyte servitor's Machine Spirit through noospheric communion, invoking harmonious engagement.
Test data-flow rhythms in the cenobyte servitor, beseeching the Omnissiah for flawless transmission.
Seal the rite with binary oaths, sanctifying the cenobyte servitor for eternal data-bondage.

Sound the emergency klaxons before the enginarium, beseeching the Omnissiah amid flickering lumen-globes.
Sever tainted power feeds from the enginarium, chanting the Rite of Purge and Reset.
Initiate the reset sequence upon the enginarium's plasma heart, anointing reactors with coolant sacraments.
Monitor the enginarium's rebirth through seismic litanies, invoking quiescent Machine Spirits.
Conclude with the Grand Realignment, restoring the enginarium to throbbing vitality.
